hypothesis: If MatAgent, which combines LLM-driven planning with external tools, diffusion-based crystal-structure generation, and a GNN-based property evaluator, is used for iterative inorganic materials discovery, then it will achieve a higher success rate (within ±0.25 eV/atom of the target formation energy) and greater compositional validity and novelty than tool-free LLM variants and MatterGen, because the integrated tool-assisted planning and feedback loop more effectively explore composition–structure–property space.
